title: Safari Animal Toys Figures, 12 PCS Realistic Jumbo Wild Jungle Animals Figurines, Large African Zoo Animal Playset with Lion,Elephant,Giraffe, Learning Toys for Kids Toddlers Boys Girls
features: Safari Animal Family - Safari animals live in the vast African jungle forest. The members are the powerful lion, the tame panda, the brave tiger, the hippopotamus with a large mouth, the big giraffe, the tough elephant, the clever orangutan, the strong rhino, the flint panter, the patient camel, the pretty David deer and the terrible crocodile. They protect the forest with their own power.

Realistic Animal Toys - Each set of the exquisite animal figure from the park will recreate real wildlife. Each lively animal is uniquely posed and has its own position. As the animal figures are made of non-toxic PVC fabric and hand-painted, they last longer and also look realistic. Perfect details without counterfeit. All kinds of giant animal figures are safe and safe for children, there will be no suffocation.

Endless fun - The realistic wildlife figures bring children huge fun. Imagine your child playing battle game from the animal figures with friends. How funny! The animal figures can also be purchased for collection or decoration. Vibrant colours, clear details and realistic pose makes the set attractive to your child.

LEARNING DEVELOPMENT TOOL - Our realistic safari animal figure playset will stimulate your child's creativity and imagination and stay away from the electrical appliances. Your child has the chance to discover the jungle, learn the history of wildlife and enjoy hours of fun. It attracts your child so that he/she can get to know and enjoy the world of wildlife. This set can be used as a reward or impulse gift.

Fits in any situation - All animal figures are packed in a plastic box with the handle so they can always stay together. The set is ideal for birthday party, Christmas, holidays, introduction game, bath toys, decoration or play on the go and home. It can always be played no matter where you and your child are.
